name: Layout Shadow
description: Layout XDBot on screen (PRIMARY), full level to OBS via a shadow PlayLayer (SHADOW).

enabled.name: Enable Shadow PlayLayer
enabled.description: Create a second offscreen PlayLayer (full level) when entering a level.

layout_on_primary.name: Apply Layout (XDBot) on PRIMARY
layout_on_primary.description: When enabled, the visible player layer is rendered in XDBot layout mode (white silhouettes, blue bg, no decor). SHADOW stays full.

spout_sender_name.name: Spout Sender Name
spout_sender_name.description: Name exposed to OBS Spout2 Capture source. Empty disables Spout (texture preview shown instead).
